ecosystem_context.note: Canon is the centralized AI agent prompt registry per ADR-004. Phase 02 (SDK) complete 2026-03-05. Phase 03 (Integration) pending ecosystem readiness.

description: Centralized AI agent prompt registry. Single, authoritative source of truth for all prompts, personas, and configurations used by AI agents. Provides versioning, governance workflows, and SDK for integration.

deliverables: Core Python source structure with FastAPI scaffolding
FastAPI application skeleton with lifespan management
SQLAlchemy async models (Prompt, PromptVersion, VersionTag, AuditLog)
JWT authentication middleware with Zitadel support
Prompt CRUD endpoints with database integration
Version creation and immutable storage logic

phase_02_completion.pending_task: T02.10 - Publish to internal PyPI (requires CI/CD pipeline)
deliverables: CanonClient class with full configuration support
Prompt retrieval methods (get_prompt, get_prompt_version, get_prompt_by_tag, list_prompts)
Prompt management methods (create_prompt, update_prompt, create_version, update_tags, delete_prompt)
In-memory caching layer with cache stats
Retry logic with tenacity exponential backoff
Custom exception hierarchy (CanonError, ConnectionError, AuthenticationError, etc.)
Pydantic models for all API types
